title: Sabatier Professional 15cm Handy Scissors – Heavy Duty Stainless Steel Multipurpose Cutting Tool with Soft Nonslip Grip Handles. Perfect for Herbs, Paper, Crafting & Household Tasks. Dishwasher Safe
features: ✅ HANDY PAIR: These scissors designed by Sabatier Professional and made by Taylors Eye Witness are small yet mighty. Their crafted blades perfectly align to produce a super accurate cutting line. They will easily and precisely cut through paper, card, flowers, packaging and other craft materials.

✅ 25 YEAR GUARANTEE: We’re so confident in the strength and quality of our product that any item found defective will be repaired or replaced without charge, subject to normal household use. Taylors Eye Witness has been making kitchen tools for over 150 years and prides itself on the reliability of our products.

✅ STYLISH & SUPER STRONG: Pictures don’t do these scissors justice. You really need to hold them in your hands to feel the high quality workmanship that has gone into making them. They look the part and feel the part and won’t let you down.

✅ MULTI-USE: These are truly a multifunction, all-purpose chopping tool, whether you are working in the kitchen cutting herbs, crafting cutting card/plastic or even in the garden. These handy snips are small enough, yet strong enough to help. Ideal as small kitchen scissors.

✅ EASY WORK: The clever designers at Sabatier don’t want you to get blisters while enjoying your hobby or creating your floral masterpiece. They have caringly added a soft rim into each handle to aid you in your work.
description: Product Description Forget bulky, heavy shears that make simple tasks feel awkward. The Sabatier Professional Handy Scissors are designed for precision, control, and convenience in a compact size. Perfect for snipping herbs, trimming flowers, opening packaging, or cutting paper and card, these multifunctional scissors deliver strength and accuracy in one lightweight tool. Small enough to store in a handbag, drawer, or toolbox, they’re always within reach for quick household, office, kitchen, or crafting jobs. The ergonomically contoured handles with a soft-grip lining provide comfort and reduce hand strain, while the non-slip finish ensures a secure hold—even when wet. Practical, portable, and built for everyday use, these scissors are the smart solution for any task that requires effortless accuracy. The video showcases the product in use.
